title: Real Job Interviews — ‘Авось Прорвемся’ & YeaHub
subtitle: All interviews and questions collected together with our partners. Recordings are available in private chats.
interviews: 1000+ real interviews, salary ranges, résumés and breakdowns — all in one place

promo.learn: Learn asynchronously and stay in touch with the job market
promo.sum: Bottom line: 1000+ interviews already inside, new ones are added constantly
promo.warn: We do not guarantee the availability of records for specific collections. The platform is updated with materials from various sources, not just this partner.
